title: Far Gardens We Never Reach
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: Three generations of Ghanaian-British women confront what was lost and what was hidden when the family matriarch's funeral unearths a love letter written in 1967 to a man none of them knew existed.
long_description: Three generations of Ghanaian-British women confront what was lost and what was hidden when the family matriarch's funeral unearths a love letter written in 1967 to a man none of them knew existed.
